process.label: Methodology
process.title: From briefing to delivery, without friction.
process.subtitle: A structured process to ensure that each recording is approved on the first try.

steps.title: Briefing
steps.desc: Alignment of tone, audience, format, and project objectives.

steps.title: Direction
steps.desc: Definition of the ideal vocal approach for the piece and the brand.

steps.title: Recording
steps.desc: Capture in professional studio with broadcast quality.

steps.title: Treatment
steps.desc: Editing, mixing, and fine adjustments for flawless delivery.

steps.title: Delivery
steps.desc: Final files in requested formats, ready for use.

studio.label: Elite Infrastructure
studio.title: Broadcast Quality, in record time.
studio.subtitle: Own studio with high performance acoustic treatment, premium equipment, and real-time connection for remote direction from anywhere in the world.

capabilities.title: Elite Capture
capabilities.desc: Professional microphone with dedicated acoustic studio treatment.

capabilities.title: Studio Mixing
capabilities.desc: Audio treatment with international broadcast level tools.

capabilities.title: Express Delivery
capabilities.desc: Simple projects in up to 24h. Larger campaigns with customized schedule.

capabilities.title: National Coverage
capabilities.desc: Remote service for agencies, production companies, and brands throughout Brazil.

certificate.label: Difference
certificate.title: Digitally Certified
certificate.desc: Each voiceover produced by Studio Sanzony.Voz receives a digital certificate of authenticity with SHA-256 technology, ensuring the integrity and originality of the audio.

features.title: Unique SHA-256 Hash
features.desc: Exclusive cryptographic fingerprint generated from the audio file.

features.title: Traceable Serial Number
features.desc: Code in SVZ-YEAR-MONTH-XXX format for quick location and auditing.

features.title: Verification QR Code
features.desc: Instant scanning on any device with a camera.

features.title: Legally Valid Document
features.desc: Timestamped record with provable authorship for contractual protection.

features.title: Protection Against Misuse
features.desc: We trace unauthorized copies and ensure the integrity of the delivery.

briefing.label: Elite Production
briefing.title: Start your
briefing.subtitle: Fill in the technical details below. Our team will analyze your briefing to deliver a voiceover with personality and impact.

form.name: Full Name
form.script_placeholder: Insert the text to be voiced. Include notes on pronunciation of brands or names if necessary.
form.success_desc: We received your request. We will contact you soon.

verification.label: Authenticity
verification.title: Verify
verification.subtitle: Enter the certificate number (e.g., {example}) to confirm its authenticity.
verification.info: The Sanzony.Voz certification system uses SHA-256 hash to ensure the originality and integrity of each audio file delivered.

invalid.title: Certificate not found
invalid.desc: No match found for this number. Check if you typed it correctly or contact Studio Sanzony.Voz.

hero.label: Strategic Catalog
hero.title: 30 Types of
hero.subtitle: Every project demands a specific tone, rhythm, and intention. Explore our service hub and discover how the right voice transforms perception into authority.

sections.authority_desc: Professional voiceover goes beyond a beautiful voice; it's about strategic vocal branding. Whether for a corporate video that inspires trust or a commercial voice that drives conversions, the narrator's technical choice directly impacts your ROI.
sections.scalability_desc: Our 30-type voiceover structure covers everything from dynamic digital (VSL, Reels, TikTok) to traditional radio and television. We guarantee broadcast quality across all formats, preserving your brand's identity at every touchpoint.
sections.explore_more: Explore other voice applications that complement your project and strengthen your vocal authority.

locucao-institucional.title: Institutional Voiceover

locucao-institucional.whyInvest: The way your company presents itself defines how it will be perceived.
locucao-institucional.objectionBreak: It's not about a pretty voice, it's about strategic positioning.
